app.rs.changes: Added `status_message: Option<String>` field to App struct for transient footer status display
app.rs.purpose: Enable error/success message display on card operations
app.rs.impact: Allows non-blocking user feedback on card state changes

input.rs.changes: Added CardMoveDir enum, allowed_target_state() validation function, try_move_card() implementation, and three async action dispatch functions (dispatch_action_pause/kill/retry)
purposes: Handle Shift+H/L keypresses for card movement
Spawn async tasks for pause/kill/retry without blocking render loop
Provide filesystem-level card directory renames with error handling
input.rs.impact: Complete card movement and action execution pathway

footer.rs.changes: Modified render_footer() to prepend status_message to legend_spans if present
footer.rs.purpose: Display transient operation results in footer before legend
footer.rs.styling: Yellow text with dark gray separator

patterns_discovered.name: Fire-and-forget async task dispatch
patterns_discovered.usage: Pause/Kill/Retry actions spawn tokio tasks without awaiting; errors logged via eprintln
patterns_discovered.rationale: Prevents blocking the render loop while letting operations complete asynchronously

patterns_discovered.name: Transient status messages with automatic clearing
patterns_discovered.usage: Status message set on operation, cleared on next keypress in handle_normal()
patterns_discovered.rationale: Provides ephemeral feedback without persistent footer clutter

patterns_discovered.name: Multi-level path validation before rename
patterns_discovered.usage: try_move_card() validates source existence, target directory, duplicate detection before fs::rename
patterns_discovered.rationale: Ensures atomicity of filesystem operations and prevents data loss

patterns_discovered.name: Team directory structure preservation
patterns_discovered.usage: Path extraction logic preserves nested team directories (.cards/team-xxx/state/card.bop → .cards/team-xxx/new-state/card.bop)
patterns_discovered.rationale: Maintains card organization hierarchy across state transitions

patterns_discovered.name: State machine transition validation
patterns_discovered.usage: allowed_target_state() explicitly whitelists safe moves (done→pending, failed→pending)
patterns_discovered.rationale: Prevents invalid state transitions from TUI; dispatcher owns pending→running

gotchas_discovered.issue: Status message lifecycle requires explicit clearing on new input
gotchas_discovered.symptom: Stale status messages persist in footer across unrelated operations
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Clear status_message at start of handle_normal() before any keypress handling

gotchas_discovered.issue: Target directory creation must happen before rename
gotchas_discovered.symptom: fs::rename fails with ENOENT if parent directory doesn't exist (e.g., team-xxx/pending/ missing)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: fs::create_dir_all() on target_dir before calling fs::rename

gotchas_discovered.issue: Duplicate card detection requires explicit exists() check
gotchas_discovered.symptom: fs::rename silently fails if card already exists in target state
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Check target_path.exists() and display user-friendly error before rename

gotchas_discovered.issue: Async task errors are only logged to eprintln (no UI feedback)
gotchas_discovered.symptom: User cannot see if pause/kill/retry failed without checking stderr
gotchas_discovered.rationale: Fire-and-forget pattern intentionally non-blocking; permanent fix deferred to future subtask

gotchas_discovered.issue: paths::find_card() must work correctly with team subdirectories
gotchas_discovered.symptom: Card movement fails if find_card() doesn't search nested team directories
gotchas_discovered.assumption: find_card() implementation already handles team subdirectory traversal

completed_requirements: Shift+H/L card movement handlers added to handle_normal()
fs::rename() with full path validation and error handling
Async action dispatch for pause/kill/retry via tokio::spawn()
Transient status messages in footer (cleared on next keypress)
Card refresh via rebuild_columns() after successful rename
approach_outcome.quality_notes: Implementation is defensive with 5-level validation chain before fs operations; error messages are user-facing; async tasks are properly spawned without blocking render loop

recommendations.item: Add unit tests for allowed_target_state() covering all legal/illegal move combinations
Implement persistent error log or toast notification system instead of eprintln for async task failures (pause/kill/retry errors currently invisible to user)
Add visual spinner/indicator in footer when async actions are in-flight (pause/kill/retry can take seconds)
Rate-limit or debounce rapid Shift+H/L presses to prevent race conditions if user mashes keys during concurrent dispatcher operations
Log card movement operations (source, target, result) to persistent audit trail for debugging
Extract CardMoveDir enum and validation logic into separate module (e.g., card_ops.rs) as more operations are added
